connect.contactflow.CfnAbout: Specifies a flow for an Amazon Connect instance.

connect.contactflow.Content.Description: The content of the flow.  For more information, see [Amazon Connect Flow language](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/connect/latest/adminguide/flow-language.html) in the *Amazon Connect Administrator Guide*.

connect.contactflow.InstanceArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon Connect instance.

connect.contactflow.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

connect.contactflow.Type.Description: The type of the flow. For descriptions of the available types, see [Choose a flow type](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/connect/latest/adminguide/create-contact-flow.html#contact-flow-types) in the *Amazon Connect Administrator Guide*.
